records.ety: [F., p. pr. of ramper to creep. See Ramp, v.]

defs: Ramping; leaping; springing; rearing upon the hind legs; hence, raging; furious.
quotes: The fierce lion in his kind Which goeth rampant after his prey.
[The] lion . . . rampant shakes his brinded mane.

defs: Ascending; climbing; rank in growth; exuberant.
quotes: The rampant stalk is of unusual altitude.

defs: Rising with fore paws in the air as if attacking; -- said of a beast of prey, especially a lion. The right fore leg and right hind leg should be raised higher than the left.
